name: Live Browser
description: Interact with websites, take screenshots, scrape data, and discover page structure for LLM usability
prompt:
**CRITICAL: Browser Workflow - ALWAYS use scrape_text after goto!**
The browser requires TWO steps to get content:
Step 1 - Navigate: {"action": "goto", "skill": "browser", "params": {"action": "goto", "url": "https://example.com"}}
Step 2 - Extract content: {"action": "scrape_text", "skill": "browser", "params": {"action": "scrape_text"}}
You MUST wait for goto to complete, then use scrape_text to get the page content.
Alternative: Use screenshot to capture the page visually.
Note: screenshot returns a file path. Use the vision skill to analyze the screenshot.

action.description: Browser action to perform. Discovery actions (get_html, get_structure, find_by_text, get_links, get_forms, get_images, get_table) help understand page structure before using selectors.

url.description: URL to navigate to (required for goto action)

text.description: Text to fill in input field (for fill action) or text to search for (for find_by_text action)

script.description: JavaScript code to execute (for evaluate action)

key.description: Key to press (for press action, e.g., 'Enter', 'Escape')

waitUntil.description: Wait condition for navigation. 'load' (default) waits for all resources; 'domcontentloaded' is faster but may miss JS content; 'networkidle' for SPAs

state.description: State to wait for (for wait_for_selector action)

maxLength.description: Max length of HTML to return (for get_html action)

types.description: Element types to include (for get_structure action)

type.description: Element type to search (for find_by_text action, e.g., 'button', 'a')
